verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Cantate Domino canticum novum ;  laus ejus in ecclesia sanctorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ שִׁ֣ירוּ לַֽ֭יהֹוָה שִׁ֣יר חָדָ֑שׁ תְּ֝הִלָּת֗וֹ בִּקְהַ֥ל חֲסִידִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. Sing unto the Lord a new song, and his praise in the congregation of saints.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætetur Israël in eo qui fecit eum,  et filii Sion exsultent in rege suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׂמַ֣ח יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל בְּעֹשָׂ֑יו בְּנֵֽי־צִ֝יּ֗וֹן יָגִ֥ילוּ בְמַלְכָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let Israel rejoice in him that made him: let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudent nomen ejus in choro ;  in tympano et psalterio psallant ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהַלְל֣וּ שְׁמ֣וֹ בְמָח֑וֹל בְּתֹ֥ף וְ֝כִנּ֗וֹר יְזַמְּרוּ־לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Let them praise his name in the dance: let them sing praises unto him with the timbrel and harp.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia beneplacitum est Domino in populo suo,  et exaltabit mansuetos in salutem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־רוֹצֶ֣ה יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּעַמּ֑וֹ יְפָאֵ֥ר עֲ֝נָוִ֗ים בִּישׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsultabunt sancti in gloria ;  lætabuntur in cubilibus suis.
verses.king_james: Let the saints be joyful in glory: let them sing aloud upon their beds.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltationes Dei in gutture eorum,  et gladii ancipites in manibus eorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רוֹמְמ֣וֹת אֵ֭ל בִּגְרוֹנָ֑ם וְחֶ֖רֶב פִּיפִיּ֣וֹת בְּיָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let the high praises of God be in their mouth, and a twoedged sword in their hand;

verses.latin_vulgate: ad faciendam vindictam in nationibus,  increpationes in populis ;
verses.king_james: To execute vengeance upon the heathen, and punishments upon the people;

verses.latin_vulgate: ad alligandos reges eorum in compedibus,  et nobiles eorum in manicis ferreis ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֶאְסֹ֣ר מַלְכֵיהֶ֣ם בְּזִקִּ֑ים וְ֝נִכְבְּדֵיהֶ֗ם בְּכַבְלֵ֥י בַרְזֶֽל׃
verses.king_james: To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut faciant in eis judicium conscriptum :  gloria hæc est omnibus sanctis ejus.  Alleluja.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַעֲשׂ֤וֹת בָּהֶ֨ם ׀ מִשְׁפָּ֬ט כָּת֗וּב הָדָ֣ר ה֭וּא לְכׇל־חֲסִידָ֗יו הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: To execute upon them the judgment written: this honour have all his saints. Praise ye the Lord.
